title: Southern Command Moves Quickly to Support Venezuela Earthquake Relief
description: As directed by the War Department, U.S. Southern Command is working with the State Department to support U.S. government relief operations in Venezuela in response to devastating earthquakes.

body.text: As directed by the War Department, U.S. Southern Command is working with the State Department to support U.S. government relief operations in Venezuela in response to the devastating June 24 earthquakes.

Joint Task Force Bravo members load equipment into a CH-47 Chinook helicopter in preparation for potential support to Venezuela's disaster relief response at Soto Cano Air Base, Honduras, June 25, 2026.
